DROP TABLE [EDW].[DIM_FB_ADS_ADSET]
GO

SET ANSI_NULLS ON
GO
SET QUOTED_IDENTIFIER ON
GO

CREATE TABLE [EDW].[DIM_FB_ADS_ADSET]
( 
	[AdsetID] [nvarchar](256)  NULL,
	[CampaignID] [nvarchar](256)  NULL,
	[AccountID] [nvarchar](256)  NULL,
	[AdsetName] [nvarchar](256)  NULL,
	[BidStrategy] [nvarchar](256)  NULL,
	[OptimizationGoal] [nvarchar](256)  NULL,
	[OptimizationSubEvent] [nvarchar](256)  NULL,
	[ConfiguredStatus] [nvarchar](256)  NULL,
	[Status] [nvarchar](256)  NULL,
	[EffectiveStatus] [nvarchar](256)  NULL,
	[CreatedTime] [nvarchar](256)  NULL,
	[StartTime] [nvarchar](256)  NULL,
	[UpdatedTime] [nvarchar](256)  NULL,
	[EndTime] [nvarchar](256)  NULL,
	[BillingEvent] [nvarchar](256)  NULL,
	[BudgetRemaining] [nvarchar](256)  NULL,
	[DailyBudget] [nvarchar](256)  NULL,
	[LifetimeBudget] [nvarchar](256)  NULL,
	[RecurringBudgetSemantics] [bit]  NULL,
	[DestinationType] [nvarchar](256)  NULL,
	[IsDynamicCreative] [bit]  NULL,
	[LookAlikePercentage] [nvarchar](256)  NULL,
	[AgeMin] [bigint]  NULL,
	[AgeMax] [bigint]  NULL,
	[Genders] [nvarchar](256)  NULL,
	[GeoCountries] [nvarchar](256)  NULL,
	[PacingType] [nvarchar](4000)  NULL,
	[Device] [nvarchar](4000)  NULL,
	[AdsetSchedule] [nvarchar](4000)  NULL,
	[AttributionSpec] [nvarchar](4000)  NULL,
	[BehaviorsFullDetails] [nvarchar](4000)  NULL,
	[BehaviorsFullDetailsString] [nvarchar](256)  NULL,
	[BehaviorsIDs] [nvarchar](4000)  NULL,
	[BehaviorsIDsString] [nvarchar](256)  NULL,
	[BehaviorsNames] [nvarchar](4000)  NULL,
	[BehaviorsNamesString] [nvarchar](256)  NULL,
	[BidAmount] [bigint]  NULL,
	[BidInfoActions] [bigint]  NULL,
	[BidInfoClicks] [bigint]  NULL,
	[BidInfoReach] [bigint]  NULL,
	[CustomAudienceFullDetails] [nvarchar](4000)  NULL,
	[CustomAudienceFullDetailsString] [nvarchar](512)  NULL,
	[CustomAudienceIDs] [nvarchar](4000)  NULL,
	[CustomAudienceIDsString] [nvarchar](256)  NULL,
	[CustomAudienceNames] [nvarchar](4000)  NULL,
	[CustomAudienceNamesString] [nvarchar](256)  NULL,
	[ExcludedCustomAudiencesFullDetails] [nvarchar](4000)  NULL,
	[ExcludedCustomAudiencesFullDetailsString] [nvarchar](512)  NULL,
	[ExcludedCustomAudiencesIDs] [nvarchar](4000)  NULL,
	[ExcludedCustomAudiencesIDsString] [nvarchar](256)  NULL,
	[ExcludedCustomAudiencesNames] [nvarchar](4000)  NULL,
	[ExcludedCustomAudiencesNamesString] [nvarchar](512)  NULL,
	[ExcludedCustomAudiencesString] [nvarchar](4000)  NULL,
	[ExcludedGeoCountries] [nvarchar](256)  NULL,
	[FrequencyControlSpecs] [nvarchar](4000)  NULL,
	[InstagramActorID] [nvarchar](256)  NULL,
	[InterestsFullDetails] [nvarchar](4000)  NULL,
	[InterestsFullDetailsString] [nvarchar](1024)  NULL,
	[InterestsIds] [nvarchar](4000)  NULL,
	[InterestsIdsString] [nvarchar](512)  NULL,
	[InterestsNames] [nvarchar](4000)  NULL,
	[InterestsNamesString] [nvarchar](512)  NULL,
	[LookAlikePercentageString] [nvarchar](256)  NULL,
	[LifetimeImps] [bigint]  NULL,
	[PromotedObjectApplicationID] [nvarchar](4000)  NULL,
	[PromotedObjectCustomEventType] [nvarchar](32)  NULL,
	[PromotedObjectObjectStoreUrl] [nvarchar](4000)  NULL,
	[PromotedObjectOfferID] [nvarchar](4000)  NULL,
	[PromotedObjectPageID] [nvarchar](16)  NULL,
	[PromotedObjectPixelID] [nvarchar](16)  NULL,
	[PromotedObjectPixelRule] [nvarchar](128)  NULL,
	[SeedAudience] [nvarchar](256)  NULL,
	[SourceAdsetID] [nvarchar](256)  NULL,
	[UseNewAppClick] [bit]  NULL,
	[UserOS] [nvarchar](4000)  NULL,
	[UserOSString] [nvarchar](4000)  NULL
)
WITH
(
	DISTRIBUTION = REPLICATE,
	CLUSTERED COLUMNSTORE INDEX
)
GO
